title: settings — trait composition
description: No owned traits at the model level — settings classes extend spatie's Settings directly. Consuming modules use HasActivityLog + HasAudit on their settings classes so dual-write listeners can produce properly-scoped rows.

usedBy: Every settings class extends this base
Applied to settings classes so WriteSettingsChangeToActivity can produce activity_log rows
Applied to settings classes so WriteSettingsChangeToAudit can produce audit rows

composition.note: A canonical settings class looks like: `class NotificationSettings extends Settings { use HasActivityLog, HasAudit; }`. Both traits are opt-in but strongly recommended — the dual-write listeners depend on them.
